text.title: handoff-id-payload Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for handoff-id-payload as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Passing the entire prior conversation as the handoff because "the next agent might need it".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: It almost always doesn't; when it does, fetching by task_id costs the same and is reversible.

failure-mode.description: Using the handoff payload as the only source of task state, with no shared store at all.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Re-runs and audit trails become impossible; the system has no memory between agents besides what was passed in the last hop.
